overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic urban environment. The player moves from a narrow graffiti-covered alley, ascends stairs through a transitional plaza, navigates a bustling pedestrian commercial zone with food vendors and neon signs, and finally approaches a city street with moving traffic. The scene features cyberpunk architecture with mixed natural sunlight and artificial neon lighting.

events.description: moving from open alley entrance into covered walkway beneath concrete overpass
entering darker shadowed area with reduced natural light

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow alleyway with graffiti-covered walls, passing a parked red vintage car

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
parked burgundy vintage sedan with chrome details
large colorful advertisement billboard mounted on building facade
massive concrete highway overpass creating covered walkway below
scattered trash and discarded items along the concrete ground

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow urban alley with heavily graffiti-tagged walls. A red vintage car is parked on the right beneath a colorful billboard. The camera moves forward into a covered walkway beneath a massive concrete overpass, where lighting becomes significantly darker and more shadowed.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional plaza with tree planter and stair access

events.description: beginning ascent of concrete staircase leading to upper pedestrian level
emerging from shadowed stairwell into bright sunlight at top of stairs

agents.ego_description: walking up concrete stairs from lower alley to upper pedestrian plaza level, passing a tree in a circular planter

entered.detail: large concrete planter containing mature tree with green foliage
wide concrete stairs with solid railings leading upward
holographic street sign displaying district name with directional arrow
large metal exhaust pipes and industrial equipment on building exterior
corrugated metal wall with graffiti on right side of passage

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a small plaza with a tree in a circular concrete planter. A holographic street sign for 'Vista Del Rey' is visible on the left. The camera approaches and ascends a wide concrete staircase, transitioning from the shadowed lower level into bright sunlight at the top, revealing industrial ventilation pipes and metal structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian plaza with food vendors and vending machines

events.description: exiting narrow passage into open pedestrian plaza with commercial activity and NPCs
entering busy area with multiple pedestrians, food stalls, and automated vending machines

agents.ego_description: navigating through busy pedestrian plaza past food stalls and purple vending machines, avoiding other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: woman in plaid shirt and shorts walking past camera toward the left side
man sitting at food counter eating a meal

entered.detail: open-air food counter with customers seated on white stools
pair of bright purple automated vending machines with digital displays
glowing purple and pink neon signs for local businesses
elevated walkway structure spanning above the plaza
patterned concrete paving with green and white colored sections

segments.scene_description: Emerging into a sunlit pedestrian plaza, the scene fills with moderate crowds of NPCs walking about. Food vendor stalls line the left side with customers seated at counters, while bright purple vending machines stand prominently in the center. Neon business signs glow in the background beneath an overhead pedestrian bridge.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway with restaurant seating and neon signage

events.description: entering covered walkway section with Cirrus Cola restaurant and outdoor bar seating

agents.ego_description: walking past the Cirrus Cola bar and outdoor dining area, observing seated patrons and browsing pedestrians

notable_agents.action: man in orange jacket sitting at bar counter with back to camera

entered.detail: commercial food establishment with blue and red signage and neon yellow counter trim
metal stools and tables arranged along the restaurant front
large digital billboards displaying animated advertisements
overhead concrete structure providing partial cover with fluorescent light fixtures
rectangular planters with tropical plants dividing walkway sections

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into a covered commercial walkway featuring the Cirrus Cola restaurant with its distinctive blue and red signage. Patrons sit at outdoor bar seating along the left, while illuminated advertising screens glow on the right. The area is partially covered by an overhead concrete structure with neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street intersection with vehicle traffic and tunnel entrance

events.description: approaching active city street with moving vehicles and traffic flow
transitioning from pedestrian walkway to vehicle road crossing area with asphalt surface

agents.ego_description: approaching city street with moving traffic, observing vehicles and preparing to navigate the intersection

notable_agents.action: brown sedan driving along the street from left to right

entered.detail: asphalt road with lane markings and active vehicle traffic
dark underpass or tunnel entrance for vehicles beneath buildings
concrete dividers and metal railings separating pedestrian and vehicle areas
traffic lights and street signs controlling vehicle flow

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches an active city street with asphalt paving and moving traffic. A brown sedan drives past as the camera nears the intersection. To the right, a dark tunnel entrance is visible beneath the buildings, while traffic infrastructure and road barriers define the separation between pedestrian and vehicle zones.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a secluded, shadowed alleyway into a vibrant, sun-drenched commercial district. It begins amidst graffiti-tagged walls and a parked red vintage car, moving forward into the deep shadows of a massive concrete overpass. As the camera emerges from the darkness, it passes a holographic street sign and ascends a wide staircase, transitioning from the dim lower level into bright sunlight and industrial metal structures. The scene then expands into a bustling pedestrian plaza filled with crowds, food vendors, and glowing purple vending machines before shifting into a covered commercial walkway featuring the blue and red signage of a Cirrus Cola restaurant. Finally, the movement leads toward an active city street, where the pedestrian zone gives way to asphalt paving and moving traffic passing a dark tunnel entrance.
